core_dimensions.theta_init_offset_note: Offset added to true parameter theta* in Appendix C; order [tau, omega, z].

qfrt_spectral.lambda_ridge_note: QFRT_IEEE4 Eq.(8) denominator uses +lambda with lambda ~ 1e-12 as a ridge term.

b_lite_update.Dmin_constant_note: For the open-eval canonical instance, we fix Dmin_constant to delta from Eq.(29) (QFRT_IEEE4 Appendix B: epsilon=1e-4, delta=1e-8), instead of using the full dynamic clipping formula.

pt_projection_and_leakage.rho_leak_threshold_note: If rho_leak > 0.1 persistently, enter fallback mode (Algorithm 2, Section C).
pt_projection_and_leakage.leakage_ratio_definition: Leakage Ratio (LR) = energy(PT-odd sector) / energy(PT-even sector), used as a PT-sector stability indicator in this public evidence surface.

lock_and_acceptance_thresholds.tau_notes: Threshold policy can be static/adaptive/profile-based; numeric values are scenario-dependent and intentionally not fixed in this public surface.

S1_Ideal.description: Ideal baseline with stationary AWGN and full sampling.

S3_Hetero.description: Heteroscedastic noise with time-varying variance over the frame.

S_PT_z0.description: Paper-defined S_PT (Table II): z_true=0, ghost-mode drift test.
S_PT_z0.note: Matches QFRT_IEEE4 Table II; z* = 0 in physical frame.

S_PT_zNZ.note: Additional robustness study; not in original paper.
